title: PricingModel
description: The pricing structure or tariff model used by a mobility service provider to calculate fares.

modelType.description: Type of pricing model (e.g. FIXED, METERED, SUBSCRIPTION, SURGE)

baseRate.description: Base fare charged at the start of a trip

perMinuteRate.description: Additional charge per minute of travel

perKmRate.description: Additional charge per kilometre of travel

surgeEnabled.description: Whether surge pricing can be applied

tags.description: Tags or labels associated with the offer
